description.value: Keyword: [Hindered] Effect: All attribute dice: Add 2 to die results. Long and short rests provide no benefit. Target takes [[/damage 8]] damage each hour until the condition is removed. Recovery: [[/save type=fortitude]] at end of 4 hours (1 success). Antidote can remove condition early.

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Poisoned (Deadly)
